dialogue.text: What kind of system do you want?
A mobile app that helps people find nearby restaurants and check their details.
Normal users on their phones, restaurant owners on a web portal, and admins.
What should users be able to do?

Users should search for restaurants, switch between map and list results, open detailed restaurant info, and get GPS navigation. Restaurant owners should manage restaurant info, and admins should verify owners.
Do users need login or authentication?
Yeah, users should log in on the mobile app, and owners plus admins need portal accounts too.
Search should come back in 2 seconds max, and if GPS or internet drops, the app should tell the user.
Login messages have to be encrypted, and after three failed portal logins it should lock things for half an hour.

functional_capabilities.action: search for restaurants using multiple search options
view restaurant results in map and list views
navigate to a selected restaurant using GPS
manage restaurant information through the web portal

performance_constraints.text: inform the user if internet or GPS connectivity is lost

security_constraints.text: disable restaurant owner and administrator log-in for 30 minutes after three failed attempts

functional.text: The system shall support authentication using mobile app username/password login and web portal username/password login.
The system shall allow users to search for restaurants using multiple search options.
The system shall allow users to view restaurant results in map and list views.
The system shall allow users to open detailed restaurant information pages.
The system shall allow users to navigate to a selected restaurant using GPS.
The system shall allow restaurant owners to manage restaurant information through the web portal.
The system shall allow administrators to verify restaurant owners.

non_functional.text: The system shall return search results within 2 seconds.
The system shall inform the user if internet or GPS connectivity is lost.
The system shall encrypt log-in communication messages.
The system shall disable restaurant owner and administrator log-in for 30 minutes after three failed attempts.
